# Port target: `eslint-plugin-testing-library`

| | |
|---|---|
| Upstream repo | https://github.com/testing-library/eslint-plugin-testing-library |
| Submodule | `upstream/eslint-plugin-testing-library` @ `v7.16.2` |
| Baseline npm version | `7.16.2` |
| License | MIT |
| Oxlint native support | none — port target |
| Rules to port | 29 |

## Rules

| # | Rule | Description | Docs |
|---|------|-------------|------|
| 1 | `await-async-events` | Enforce promises from async event methods are handled | [docs](https://github.com/testing-library/eslint-plugin-testing-library/blob/main/docs/rules/await-async-events.md) |
| 2 | `await-async-queries` | Enforce promises from async queries to be handled | [docs](https://github.com/testing-library/eslint-plugin-testing-library/blob/main/docs/rules/await-async-queries.md) |
| 3 | `await-async-utils` | Enforce promises from async utils to be awaited properly | [docs](https://github.com/testing-library/eslint-plugin-testing-library/blob/main/docs/rules/await-async-utils.md) |
| 4 | `consistent-data-testid` | Ensures consistent usage of `data-testid` | [docs](https://github.com/testing-library/eslint-plugin-testing-library/blob/main/docs/rules/consistent-data-testid.md) |
| 5 | `no-await-sync-events` | Disallow unnecessary `await` for sync events | [docs](https://github.com/testing-library/eslint-plugin-testing-library/blob/main/docs/rules/no-await-sync-events.md) |
| 6 | `no-await-sync-queries` | Disallow unnecessary `await` for sync queries | [docs](https://github.com/testing-library/eslint-plugin-testing-library/blob/main/docs/rules/no-await-sync-queries.md) |
| 7 | `no-container` | Disallow the use of `container` methods | [docs](https://github.com/testing-library/eslint-plugin-testing-library/blob/main/docs/rules/no-container.md) |
| 8 | `no-debugging-utils` | Disallow the use of debugging utilities like `debug` | [docs](https://github.com/testing-library/eslint-plugin-testing-library/blob/main/docs/rules/no-debugging-utils.md) |
| 9 | `no-dom-import` | Disallow importing from DOM Testing Library | [docs](https://github.com/testing-library/eslint-plugin-testing-library/blob/main/docs/rules/no-dom-import.md) |
| 10 | `no-global-regexp-flag-in-query` | Disallow the use of the global RegExp flag (/g) in queries | [docs](https://github.com/testing-library/eslint-plugin-testing-library/blob/main/docs/rules/no-global-regexp-flag-in-query.md) |
| 11 | `no-manual-cleanup` | Disallow the use of `cleanup` | [docs](https://github.com/testing-library/eslint-plugin-testing-library/blob/main/docs/rules/no-manual-cleanup.md) |
| 12 | `no-node-access` | Disallow direct Node access | [docs](https://github.com/testing-library/eslint-plugin-testing-library/blob/main/docs/rules/no-node-access.md) |
| 13 | `no-promise-in-fire-event` | Disallow the use of promises passed to a `fireEvent` method | [docs](https://github.com/testing-library/eslint-plugin-testing-library/blob/main/docs/rules/no-promise-in-fire-event.md) |
| 14 | `no-render-in-lifecycle` | Disallow the use of `render` in testing frameworks setup functions | [docs](https://github.com/testing-library/eslint-plugin-testing-library/blob/main/docs/rules/no-render-in-lifecycle.md) |
| 15 | `no-test-id-queries` | Ensure no `data-testid` queries are used | [docs](https://github.com/testing-library/eslint-plugin-testing-library/blob/main/docs/rules/no-test-id-queries.md) |
| 16 | `no-unnecessary-act` | Disallow wrapping Testing Library utils or empty callbacks in `act` | [docs](https://github.com/testing-library/eslint-plugin-testing-library/blob/main/docs/rules/no-unnecessary-act.md) |
| 17 | `no-wait-for-multiple-assertions` | Disallow the use of multiple `expect` calls inside `waitFor` | [docs](https://github.com/testing-library/eslint-plugin-testing-library/blob/main/docs/rules/no-wait-for-multiple-assertions.md) |
| 18 | `no-wait-for-side-effects` | Disallow the use of side effects in `waitFor` | [docs](https://github.com/testing-library/eslint-plugin-testing-library/blob/main/docs/rules/no-wait-for-side-effects.md) |
| 19 | `no-wait-for-snapshot` | Ensures no snapshot is generated inside of a `waitFor` call | [docs](https://github.com/testing-library/eslint-plugin-testing-library/blob/main/docs/rules/no-wait-for-snapshot.md) |
| 20 | `prefer-explicit-assert` | Suggest using explicit assertions rather than standalone queries | [docs](https://github.com/testing-library/eslint-plugin-testing-library/blob/main/docs/rules/prefer-explicit-assert.md) |
| 21 | `prefer-find-by` | Suggest using `find(All)By*` query instead of `waitFor` + `get(All)By*` to wait for elements | [docs](https://github.com/testing-library/eslint-plugin-testing-library/blob/main/docs/rules/prefer-find-by.md) |
| 22 | `prefer-implicit-assert` | Suggest using implicit assertions for getBy* & findBy* queries | [docs](https://github.com/testing-library/eslint-plugin-testing-library/blob/main/docs/rules/prefer-implicit-assert.md) |
| 23 | `prefer-presence-queries` | Ensure appropriate `get*`/`query*` queries are used with their respective matchers | [docs](https://github.com/testing-library/eslint-plugin-testing-library/blob/main/docs/rules/prefer-presence-queries.md) |
| 24 | `prefer-query-by-disappearance` | Suggest using `queryBy*` queries when waiting for disappearance | [docs](https://github.com/testing-library/eslint-plugin-testing-library/blob/main/docs/rules/prefer-query-by-disappearance.md) |
| 25 | `prefer-query-matchers` | Ensure the configured `get*`/`query*` query is used with the corresponding matchers | [docs](https://github.com/testing-library/eslint-plugin-testing-library/blob/main/docs/rules/prefer-query-matchers.md) |
| 26 | `prefer-screen-queries` | Suggest using `screen` while querying | [docs](https://github.com/testing-library/eslint-plugin-testing-library/blob/main/docs/rules/prefer-screen-queries.md) |
| 27 | `prefer-user-event` | Suggest using `userEvent` over `fireEvent` for simulating user interactions | [docs](https://github.com/testing-library/eslint-plugin-testing-library/blob/main/docs/rules/prefer-user-event.md) |
| 28 | `prefer-user-event-setup` | Suggest using userEvent with setup() instead of direct methods | [docs](https://github.com/testing-library/eslint-plugin-testing-library/blob/main/docs/rules/prefer-user-event-setup.md) |
| 29 | `render-result-naming-convention` | Enforce a valid naming for return value from `render` | [docs](https://github.com/testing-library/eslint-plugin-testing-library/blob/main/docs/rules/render-result-naming-convention.md) |
